languages.text: Плазменный ожог,оставленный на заставе, больше похож на след одиночного выстрела, нежели на последствия боя.

traits.locale_text: Плазменный ожог,оставленный на заставе, больше похож на след одиночного выстрела, нежели на последствия боя.

languages.text: The plasma burn found at the outpost looks more like a mark from a single shot than the aftermath of a sustained firefight.
languages.original_text: Плазменный ожог,оставленный на заставе, больше похож на след одиночного выстрела, нежели на последствия боя.

traits.locale_text: The plasma burn left at the outpost more closely resembles the mark of a single shot than the aftermath of a sustained firefight.
The plasma burn left at the outpost more closely resembles the mark of a single shot than the aftermath of a sustained firefight.
The plasma burn found at the outpost looks more like a mark from a single shot than the aftermath of a sustained firefight.
The plasma burn found at the outpost looks more like a mark from a single shot than the aftermath of a sustained firefight.

languages.text: Die Plasmaspuren am Außenposten deuten eher auf einen einzelnen Schuss als auf ein ernsthaftes Feuergefecht hin.
languages.original_text: The plasma burn found at the outpost looks more like a mark from a single shot than the aftermath of a sustained firefight.

traits.locale_text: Die Plasmaspuren am Außenposten deuten eher auf einen einzelnen Schuss als auf ein ernsthaftes Feuergefecht hin.

languages.text: La trace de brûlure au plasma découverte à l'avant-poste ressemble plus au résultat d'un seul tir qu'à celui d'un combat prolongé.
languages.original_text: The plasma burn found at the outpost looks more like a mark from a single shot than the aftermath of a sustained firefight.

traits.locale_text: La trace de brûlure au plasma découverte à l'avant-poste ressemble plus au résultat d'un seul tir qu'à celui d'un combat prolongé.

languages.text: 在前哨发现的那处等离子烧灼痕迹看上去更像是单发射击留下的，而非持续交火造成。
languages.original_text: The plasma burn found at the outpost looks more like a mark from a single shot than the aftermath of a sustained firefight.

traits.locale_text: 在前哨发现的那处等离子烧灼痕迹看上去更像是单发射击留下的，而非持续交火造成。

languages.text: La quemadura de plasma descubierta en el puesto avanzado parece haber sido causada por un único disparo; no existen indicios de un combate prolongado.
languages.original_text: The plasma burn found at the outpost looks more like a mark from a single shot than the aftermath of a sustained firefight.

traits.locale_text: La quemadura de plasma descubierta en el puesto avanzado parece haber sido causada por un único disparo; no existen indicios de un combate prolongado.

languages.text: 前哨基地のプラズマ焼けは、戦闘の後遺症というより、一発の銃弾の跡のように見える。
languages.original_text: The plasma burn at the outpost looks more like the mark of a single gunshot than the aftermath of a battle.

languages.text: Karakolda bulunan plazma yanığı, uzun süreli bir çatışmanın sonrasından çok tek bir atışın izine benziyor.
languages.original_text: The plasma burn found at the outpost looks more like a mark from a single shot than the aftermath of a sustained firefight.

traits.locale_text: Karakolda bulunan plazma yanığı, uzun süreli bir çatışmanın sonrasından çok tek bir atışın izine benziyor.
